quality_notes: Align the post more closely to the planned diagram labels so the image and text tell the same story.
Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
📌 Reliable Transit

I used to think that Japan's railway systems were just exceptionally well-managed, but it turns out that their high reliability and punctuality are largely due to technical design 🚂. The core concept is simple: implementing robust fail-safes and redundancy in critical infrastructure.

This fundamental idea is what sets their systems apart, allowing them to maintain an impressive level of service even in the face of unexpected disruptions 🌟.

So what can we learn from this? By prioritizing reliability and building in redundancy, we can create more resilient systems that better serve their users 🚀.

💬 What's the most important aspect of Japan's railway systems to you? #ScaleEngineering #SystemDesign #SoftwareArchitecture #DistributedSystems
